reviews.review_description: i love it so much. The exhibition was as real as it was real,beautiful，but the demo version just has some issues when i wanna visit another art exhibition，it suddenlly frozen,no button can work

i really think this app has a lot of potential but 

teleportation ruins the experience for me. i understand its great for those with motion sickness but there should be an option for free movement. that feels realistic.

bugs:

- left rotation doesnt work
- entering certain galleries hangs

developer_response.body:
Hey Nikeetz! 

We default all users into Teleport to start because it is more comfortable to people that are new to VR. If you have your VR legs and prefer smooth locomotion you can toggle into locomotion by opening the menu (Press A) click settings, toggle Movement to Locomotion. I hope we cross paths in Art Gate soon. Thanks for visiting our art district!

reviews.review_title: VR is next for the art market
reviews.review_description: I discovered Art Gate in 2018 and saw the platform growing into an amazing marketplace in VR for post-modern and contemporary art. I love seeing art dealers using technology to help make the art world more accessible. Every time I do a gallery hop in Art Gate, there are new exhibitions and new art galleries to discover!

good be something i really like. 
got stuck within minutes. screen prompting me to press A on controller.
have waited a while, nothing happens.
The second try, jumping to a next spot suddenly not available anymore!
How? What?
Love being able to check out gallery shows from around the world and chat with other artists and curators!

reviews.review_title: I've played it before I think.
reviews.review_description: But probably on GO, and now it's on Quest. Simple rooms, but nice art.
This is an awesome way to connect with a global art world and explore galleries with great artwork.

reviews.review_title: My new favorite art district is in VR!
reviews.review_description: In the last year I've been to dozens of art openings at galleries from around the world through this app. It is my favorite way to connect with art dealers and find new artworks to collect. Well done! Definately give it a try if you want to meet new art friends from around the world and collect some art. I even found some Andy Warhols in there! 10/10
Such a cool idea...access to so many different artists all from the comfort of your living room.
